nodes.label: AI as creative partner for brainstorming and editing
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or requiring supervision
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me brainstorm ideas for my next episode, help me complete outlines for the research, find sources for my actual research, and write a script

nodes.label: AI as burden-sharer during creative block or overwhelm
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient when I need more input
nodes.grounding_span: there are times when I am feeling very overwhelmed and can't really shoulder the weight of being creative and I might require a bit more input

nodes.label: AI as editor for trimming and polishing scripts
nodes.label_negative: AI as removing content I worked hard on
nodes.grounding_span: I asked the model to trim approximately 10 minutes worth of time. It did fairly well at keeping the key points in and removing some extraneous chatter

nodes.label: AI as tool to sharpen research skills through fact-checking
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of errors requiring double-checking
nodes.grounding_span: double checking some of the information interjected by a model helps me to deepen my own research abilities

nodes.label: AI as threat to human authenticity in creative work
nodes.label_negative: AI as opportunity for adaptation and pivot
nodes.grounding_span: The injection of AI voices and completely AI written scripts have garnered a small following... it is just an opportunity for me to pivot myself

nodes.label: AI as future automation of tedious audio editing
nodes.label_negative: AI as not yet advanced enough for full automation
nodes.grounding_span: it would be nice to pass that job off to an AI completely, as it is my least favorite part of the whole process

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and overcoming writer's block
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I have writer's block and need a little help, which is when I turn to the model for inspiration

nodes.label: Emotional relief and reduced stress
nodes.grounding_span: It helped ease some of the stress I was feeling to produce an episode

nodes.label: Polished and high-quality podcast output
nodes.grounding_span: using AI in the last editing stage helps me deliver a more polished and smooth podcast overall

nodes.label: Personal growth in research skills
nodes.grounding_span: my own research skills have actually improved

nodes.label: Adaptability and resilience in creative career
nodes.grounding_span: it all comes down to an ability to adapt

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings in production
nodes.grounding_span: editing and basically splicing in edited sections is a difficult and time consuming part of my work

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for brainstorming and editing
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me brainstorm ideas for my next episode, help me complete outlines for the research, find sources for my actual research, and write a script

nodes.label: Ambivalent about AI's role during overwhelm
nodes.grounding_span: there are times when I am feeling very overwhelmed and can't really shoulder the weight of being creative and I might require a bit more input

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI's editing help
nodes.grounding_span: It helped ease some of the stress I was feeling to produce an episode as well as remove points, which I loathe

nodes.label: Positive view of AI improving research skills
nodes.grounding_span: my own research skills have actually improved

nodes.label: Mixed concern about AI replacing human authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: The injection of AI voices and completely AI written scripts have garnered a small following... it is just an opportunity for me to pivot myself

nodes.label: Positive anticipation for AI automating audio editing
nodes.grounding_span: it would be nice to pass that job off to an AI completely, as it is my least favorite part of the whole process

nodes.label: Mood-dependent engagement — adjusts AI use based on energy and creativity
nodes.grounding_span: It really comes down to how creative I am feeling in the moment, or sometimes how my week has gone

nodes.label: Critical verification — double-checks AI outputs to deepen own understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I remember not to just take the model at its word 100% of the time, as AI models make mistakes just like humans, and so double checking some of the information interjected by a model helps me to deepen my own research abilities
